creator: olivier@gid0.org
text:
Hi,
 
 2012/4/11 Max Brazhnikov <makc@freebsd.org>:
 > I've uploaded kdesupport.diff that includes updates for akonadi, phonon, =
 qzeitgeist and a fix for cmake:
 > http://people.freebsd.org/~makc/patches/kdesupport.diff
 >
 > New patches for KDE SC 4.8.2 and Qt4.8.1:
 > http://people.freebsd.org/~makc/patches/kde-4.8.2.diff
 > http://people.freebsd.org/~makc/patches/qt-4.8.1.diff
 >
 > The patch for PyQt is the same:
 > http://people.freebsd.org/~makc/patches/pyqt-4.9.1.diff
 
 For us folks using clang, could you look at the following ?
 http://mail.kde.org/pipermail/kde-freebsd/2012-April/012861.html
 
 It solves the regression I reported on kde@ when trying to build Qt
 4.8.0 and 4.8.1 with clang.
 
 Thanks !
